TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Turkey ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, re ¶~ ®ep tajjip er*o*an, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw turkej ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a re ¶~ ®ep tajjip er*o*an, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Turkey ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw turkej ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a re ¶~ ®ep tajjip er*o*an, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
